Menus | Luella — Luella
0
A Plate for Every Palate
Your Night Your Way
Make a Reservation
“Good Hospitality Never goes out of style”
Some evenings call for tradition: a Caesar salad, a seared filet, a glass of Bordeaux, and conversation. Others feel more spontaneous: oysters, caviar, martinis, and stolen glances.
At Luella, there’s no script—just your appetite and the occasion. From crudo and raw bar classics to contemporary steakhouse favorites, our menu offers something for every mood.
And at the bar, our head Alchemist crafts cocktails with intention, using house-made shrubs, bitters, and tinctures to give familiar favorites a fresh perspective.
Arrow Up
